```shell
  @ val newIntermediateKey = participant1.keys.secret.generate_signing_key(
                  name = "NewIntermediateKey",
                  usage = Set(SigningKeyUsage.Namespace)
               )
      newIntermediateKey : SigningPublicKey = SigningPublicKey(
        id = 1220f675e567...,
        format = DER-encoded X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo,
        keySpec = EC-Curve25519,
        usage = namespace
      )

  @ participant1.keys.public.download_to(newIntermediateKey.id, "/tmp/canton/certs/new_intermediate_key.pub")
```
